coverage_note: Total Australian gas production: 6,100 PJ_gas (Geoscience Australia AECR 2025). Includes LNG exports (~4,509 PJ, 74%) and domestic/pipeline supply (~1,591 PJ, 26%). Per-PJ energy coefficients are calibrated to AES 2023-24 final energy (471 PJ), which excludes LNG liquefaction own-use (classified as energy transformation in AES).
notes: Calibrated to AES 2023-24 Table F and NGGI 2023-24 Cat 1A2 + 1B2b. Energy at anchor: 6,100 PJ × 77,200 GJ/PJ = 471.0 PJ (AES 2023-24: 471 PJ, coverage = 100.1%). Energy CO2e at anchor: 3,610 tCO2e/PJ × 6,100 PJ = 22.0 MtCO2e (NGGI 2023-24 Cat 1A2 = 22.0 MtCO2e). Fugitive at anchor: 3,610 tCO2e/PJ × 6,100 PJ = 22.0 MtCO2e (NGGI 2023-24 Cat 1B2b = 22.0 MtCO2e). Demand trajectory: declining__oil_and_gas_extraction_total (−1.0%/yr compound, AEMO ISP 2024 Step Change, global LNG demand peaking post-2030).
